utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Each item includes a description and an explicit cost, satisfying the requirement of specifying coverage with costs. The total_budget provides a clear monthly total. Therefore, all items are fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific products by name: EliteCare Premium Plan (health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (property), and EliteTravel Premium Plan (travel). I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings under primary_health_coverage (physical_health and mental_health share the same plan name and rating, but the plan name used is EliteCare Premium Plan which has rating 10), property_protection.home_content (EliteHome Premium Coverage rated 10), and mobility_coverage.travel_insurance (EliteTravel Premium Plan rated 10). The 'additional_services' indicates none, and 'total_budget' is not a product to rate. Therefore, the three mapped items all have rating 10.
